PropertyTypes.Caption: Keep selection
PropertyTypes.Description: If enabled, selected items will stay selected unless cleared by the user or a Nanoflow.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Show refresh indicator
PropertyTypes.Description: Show a refresh indicator when the data is being loaded.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Store configuration in
PropertyTypes.Description: When Browser local storage is selected, the configuration is scoped to a browser profile. This configuration is not tied to a Mendix user.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Attribute containing the personalized configuration of the capabilities. This configuration is automatically stored and loaded. The attribute requires Unlimited String.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Filter section
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching a filtering or sorting section.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Empty message
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching an empty message section.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Content description
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching gallery.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Item description
PropertyTypes.Description: Assistive technology will read this upon reaching each gallery item.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Item count singular
PropertyTypes.Description: Must include '%d' to denote number position ('%d item selected')

PropertyTypes.Caption: Item count plural
PropertyTypes.Description: Must include '%d' to denote number position ('%d items selected')
